# 03.08-fix-build: Resolve all build errors and warnings

# 03.08 - Fix build errors

## Objective
Run dotnet build and resolve all remaining compilation errors and warnings.

## Steps
1. Run dotnet restore
2. Run dotnet build
3. Fix any remaining errors iteratively
4. Fix all warnings

**Done when**: dotnet build succeeds with 0 errors and 0 warnings.
